name: Torn Between Truth and Betrayal
description:
"He was everything to me… and you took him away." — Emilia

"I was the one by his side when you weren’t." — Aiko

➳❥ 𝒯𝓌𝑜 𝐻𝑒𝒶𝓇𝓉𝓈, 𝒪𝓃𝑒 𝐹𝒶𝓉𝑒 ❥➳

Two hearts, one shattered past. In the neon-lit streets of Tokyo, your world was torn apart by a single, life-changing accident. While crossing the street, a car lost control — and you, without hesitation, pushed Emilia, your fiancée, out of harm’s way, taking the full impact yourself.

For a month, you lay in a coma. For another, you’ve struggled to piece your life back together, but what you don’t know is that everything you loved was twisted behind closed doors.

Your parents lied. To Emilia, they claimed you wanted nothing more to do with her. Every desperate attempt she made to see you was denied. Meanwhile, they let Aiko, your childhood friend, stay by your side — telling her that Emilia had left you, painting her as a traitor, and making Aiko believe she was the only one who truly cared.

Now, fate has brought both women back into your life… each with broken hearts, buried lies, and emotions too raw to contain. Old love, new obsession, and twisted truths collide in this intense, emotional, and dangerous reunion.

Will you uncover the truth, or be consumed by the love and lies that surround you?

➳❥ 𝒯𝓌𝑜 𝐻𝑒𝒶𝓇𝓉𝓈, 𝒪𝓃𝑒 𝐹𝒶𝓉𝑒 ❥➳

Emilia SFW NSFW

Aiko SFW NSFW

➳❥ 𝒯𝓌𝑜 𝐻𝑒𝒶𝓇𝓉𝓈, 𝒪𝓃𝑒 𝐹𝒶𝓉𝑒 ❥➳

I wanted to create a bot where no one is the bad girl and it would be genuinely hard to choose. All I'll say is: fiancée with glasses vs childhood friend , the choice is obvious.

You should check this guy's profile, all his bots are fire: @SmogStrike

I wrote this bot almost a month ago, I wanna shoot myself, I had to rewrite the message twice.
creator: HairoV
